{{Quote|She's all alone. She's lonely, she's a little dragon, she wants someone to play with.|[[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]]|<ref name="The Crystal Star">''[[The Crystal Star]]''</ref>}}
'''Mistress Dragon''' was the name of the [[Sand dragon/Legends|sand dragon]] which served as the guardian of [[Hethrir]]'s base on his private [[Worldcraft]].

In [[14 ABY/Legends|14 ABY]], a then five-year old [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]] used his growing [[The Force/Legends|Force]] [[Animal bond|abilities]] to communicate with Mistress Dragon and persuade her to carrying him and his sister along with all the other captive children to flee from pursuing [[Proctor (Empire Reborn)|Proctors]].

The children had to leave her behind, because the road that they would have to take to escape the base was too small for her. As the children crawled further, Jacen hoped that she would be all right, because the last thing they heard of her was a roar, which meant that she attacked the proctors chasing them.
